element_introduction_order.mastery_context: Players learn weapon switching mechanics during initial horizontal scroll
Collected during standard enemy encounters; reinforces weapon-switching strategy
Risk/reward collection for high-score runs and extra lives
Required skill gate; one boss per level progression
Blast radius mechanic adds tactical decision-making beyond arcade version
Difficulty scaling; enemy fire intensity increases on game loop

rhythm_pattern.pacing_descriptor: Horizontal scroll maintains constant forward momentum; tension builds through enemy density and bullet pattern complexity rather than arena congestion; relief comes from weapon upgrades and brief safe passages between enemy waves

difficulty_curve.early_game: Four basic weapons available immediately; initial levels introduce standard enemy formations and weapon-switching mechanics
difficulty_curve.mid_game: Stages 3-4 escalate enemy density and bullet pattern complexity; weapon upgrades become critical for survival
difficulty_curve.late_game: Stages 5-6 feature increasingly difficult bosses and denser enemy formations; firepower/speed penalties create resource tension
notable_spikes: Each boss encounter ends level progression gate
Post-loop difficulty increase: denser bullet patterns, higher enemy damage
Stage 6 final boss before game loop

notable_level_patterns.description: Scenery continuously scrolls until boss reached; player movement confined to vertical/horizontal plane while managing constant forward momentum
P-icon drops distributed throughout level to reward aggressive play and create risk/reward collection moments; upgrades directly enhance firepower tier
Single boss per stage serves as mandatory skill check before progression; bosses employ distinct bullet patterns and health pools
After completing stage 6, game loops to stage 1 with increased difficulty (denser bullets, harder enemy patterns); encouraging high-score/survival runs
